title: Power pulsator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Power pulsator''' was an upgrade component intended for use in [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] weapons, in order to inflict greater damage by adding additional plasma energy to the blaster bolt. This type of technology typically came in Mark I, II, III, IV & V types respectively, the largest of which could turn a small, holdout-style [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] into a weapon possessing power equivalent to contemporary [[Blaster rifle/Legends|rifles]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
